Product_Description: The Dream On Me TableTalk 2-in-1 High Chair is thoughtfully designed to grow with your child, seamlessly transitioning from a baby feeding chair to a toddler chair with the included conversion kit. Created with both comfort and convenience in mind, it features dual removable feeding trays—a color-coordinated, dishwasher-safe top tray for easy cleanup and a secure base tray for added stability during mealtime. The chair folds flat for compact storage, with the tray neatly stored on the back, making it ideal for homes where space matters. A padded, easy-to-clean seat and a secure 5-point safety harness ensure your child stays comfortable and supported at every stage. Built to meet all ASTM and CPSC safety standards, the TableTalk High Chair measures 38" H × 28" W × 23" D in high chair mode and 24" H × 17.5" W × 16" D as a junior chair. Suitable for children from 6 months to 3 years and supporting up to 33 lbs, it also includes a 1-year manufacturer warranty for added peace of mind.

Title: Evenflo Eat and Grow 4-in-1 Convertible High Chair (Pop Star White)
Features: GROW FROM FOOD TO FUN: Easily converts as your child grows — from Infant High Chair to Toddler Dining Chair and Tray to Toddler Standalone Chair, and finally to Big Kid Table and Chair | ADAPT TO EACH STAGE: Offers extended use across 4 modes for children age 6 months all the way up to 50 lb. (22.6 kg) | KEEP LITTLE ONES SECURE: Includes a 5-point harness to help keep wiggly babies in place | KEEP IT LOOKING FRESH: Includes a machine-washable seat pad for easy cleaning, with wipeable surfaces, including a removable tray
Product_Description: Get a taste for the highly rated high chair designed to serve you long past infancy: the versatile 4-in-1 Eat and Grow Convertible High Chair. Converting with ease through four modes that adapt to your growing and increasingly independent child, the sturdy Eat and Grow will take you from 6 months of age all the way up to 50 lb (22.6 kg) — from baby food feedings to spaghetti on their own to coloring sessions and beyond More than just a high chair, the Eat and Grow converts easily as your child grows. Mode 1 - Infant High Chair: A full-size, small-space-friendly high chair that puts you and your child at the right height while providing secure seating for infant feedings; for babies at least 6 months of age and weighing up to 40 lb (18 kg). Mode 2 - Toddler Dining Chair and Tray: A meal-time chair that lowers to the floor for when your child is more independent and wants their feet on the ground; for children weighing up to 50 lb (22.6 kg). Mode 3 - Standalone Toddler Chair: A comfy toddler chair (with the tray removed) that allows your big kid to sit comfortably for reading or play; for kids weighing up to 50 lb (22.6 kg). Mode 4 - Big Kid Table and Chair: Converts to a playtime table and chair for your independent kiddo — ready for snacks, crafts and playdates; for kids weighing up to 50 lb (22.6 kg). The multi-use Eat and Grow offers the convenience of a removable and washable tray, a colorful, easy-to-clean seat pad, a secure 5-point harness (removable in modes 3 and 4), and sturdy legs. Ready to grow from food to fun? The 4-in-1 Eat and Grow Convertible High Chair is the right choice.

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Product_Description: The Dream On Me TableTalk 2-in-1 High Chair is thoughtfully designed to grow with your child, seamlessly transitioning from a baby feeding chair to a toddler chair with the included conversion kit. Created with both comfort and convenience in mind, it features dual removable feeding trays—a color-coordinated, dishwasher-safe top tray for easy cleanup and a secure base tray for added stability during mealtime. The chair folds flat for compact storage, with the tray neatly stored on the back, making it ideal for homes where space matters. A padded, easy-to-clean seat and a secure 5-point safety harness ensure your child stays comfortable and supported at every stage. Built to meet all ASTM and CPSC safety standards, the TableTalk High Chair measures 38" H × 28" W × 23" D in high chair mode and 24" H × 17.5" W × 16" D as a junior chair. Suitable for children from 6 months to 3 years and supporting up to 33 lbs, it also includes a 1-year manufacturer warranty for added peace of mind.

Expert_Review_Inputs.title: Evenflo Eat and Grow 4-in-1 Convertible High Chair (Pop Star White)

evidenceHighlights.text: GROW FROM FOOD TO FUN: Easily converts as your child grows — from Infant High Chair to Toddler Dining Chair and Tray to Toddler Standalone Chair, and finally to Big Kid Table and Chair
ADAPT TO EACH STAGE: Offers extended use across 4 modes for children age 6 months all the way up to 50 lb. (22.6 kg)
KEEP LITTLE ONES SECURE: Includes a 5-point harness to help keep wiggly babies in place
KEEP IT LOOKING FRESH: Includes a machine-washable seat pad for easy cleaning, with wipeable surfaces, including a removable tray

Get a taste for the highly rated high chair designed to serve you long past infancy: the versatile 4-in-1 Eat and Grow Convertible High Chair. Converting with ease through four modes that adapt to your growing and increasingly independent child, the sturdy Eat and Grow will take you from 6 months of age all the way up to 50 lb (22.6 kg) — from baby food feedings to spaghetti on their own to coloring sessions and beyond More than just a high chair, the Eat and Grow converts easily as your child grows. Mode 1 - Infant High Chair: A full-size, small-space-friendly high chair that puts you and your child at the right height while providing secure seating for infant feedings; for babies at least 6 months of age and weighing up to 40 lb (18 kg). Mode 2 - Toddler Dining Chair and Tray: A meal-time chair that lowers to the floor for when your child is more independent and wants their feet on the ground; for children weighing up to 50 lb (22.6 kg). Mode 3 - Standalone Toddler Chair: A comfy toddler chair (with the tray removed) that allows your big kid to sit comfortably for reading or play; for kids weighing up to 50 lb (22.6 kg). Mode 4 - Big Kid Table and Chair: Converts to a playtime table and chair for your independent kiddo — ready for snacks, crafts and playdates; for kids weighing up to 50 lb (22.6 kg). The multi-use Eat and Grow offers the convenience of a removable and washable tray, a colorful, easy-to-clean seat pad, a secure 5-point harness (removable in modes 3 and 4), and sturdy legs. Ready to grow from food to fun? The 4-in-1 Eat and Grow Convertible High Chair is the right choice.
Maximum Weight Recommendation: 50 Pounds
Age Range Description: Toddler

Product_Description: The Dream On Me TableTalk 2-in-1 High Chair is thoughtfully designed to grow with your child, seamlessly transitioning from a baby feeding chair to a toddler chair with the included conversion kit. Created with both comfort and convenience in mind, it features dual removable feeding trays—a color-coordinated, dishwasher-safe top tray for easy cleanup and a secure base tray for added stability during mealtime. The chair folds flat for compact storage, with the tray neatly stored on the back, making it ideal for homes where space matters. A padded, easy-to-clean seat and a secure 5-point safety harness ensure your child stays comfortable and supported at every stage. Built to meet all ASTM and CPSC safety standards, the TableTalk High Chair measures 38" H × 28" W × 23" D in high chair mode and 24" H × 17.5" W × 16" D as a junior chair. Suitable for children from 6 months to 3 years and supporting up to 33 lbs, it also includes a 1-year manufacturer warranty for added peace of mind.
